title: euphorbia pekinensis subsp. pekinensis
intro: Euphorbia pekinensis subsp. pekinensis, also known as the Chinese spurge or Chinese euphorbia, is a species of succulent plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects. Euphorbia pekinensis subsp. pekinensis has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's latex is often used to make medicinal tinctures, infusions, or ointments, which are applied topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
